caption:
Neon rain slicks my skin like liquid chrome. 💧 I adjusted the haptic collar of my tactical bodysuit, the mesh panels glowing faint blue against my silhouette. The rooftop of Sector 7 hummed with the static of a thousand hidden signals.

My client waited by the edge, a cyber-armored brute with a data drive. The air smelled of ozone and expensive perfume. He stepped closer, his gloved hand brushing my waist. I leaned in, the leather of my jacket creaking.

The data transfer began—a shock of cold current racing down my spine. He smirked, eyes wide as my suit shifted. The fabric clung tighter as the bio-boosters engaged, hugging every curve beneath the layers. A low hum vibrated against his palm.

'Pretty thing,' he whispered, voice like gravel.

I smirked back, fingers grazing the hidden port at my hip. 'Just what you need for the transfer.'

The skyline blurred behind us, a tapestry of ads and desperation. We vanished into the shadows, leaving only the ghost of our heat.

The city never sleeps, but it watches.

#Cyberpunk #SciFi #NightCity #NeonDreams #CyberLove #FutureFashion #TechBabe #StreetRacer
